'''ngahudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chafferer|chafferer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-h-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chafferer|chafferer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngahudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæhidhith|ngæhidhith]] || [[word:ngæhidhij|ngæhidhij]] || [[word:ngæhidhish|ngæhidhish]] || [[word:ngæhidhi|ngæhidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngahuhudhuth|ngahuhudhuth]] || [[word:ngahuhudhuj|ngahuhudhuj]] || [[word:ngahuhudhush|ngahuhudhush]] || [[word:ngahuhudhu|ngahuhudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngahudhuth|ngahudhuth]] || [[word:ngahudhuj|ngahudhuj]] || [[word:ngahudhush|ngahudhush]] || [[word:ngahudhu|ngahudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngahufdhuth|ngahufdhuth]] || [[word:ngahufdhuj|ngahufdhuj]] || [[word:ngahufdhush|ngahufdhush]] || [[word:ngahufdhuf|ngahufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngahudhuthu|ngahudhuthu]] || [[word:ngahudhuju|ngahudhuju]] || [[word:ngahudhushu|ngahudhushu]] || [[word:ngahudhuku|ngahudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngahudhuth|ngahudhuth]] || [[word:ngahudhuj|ngahudhuj]] || [[word:ngahudhush|ngahudhush]] || [[word:ngahudhu|ngahudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngahudhuthul|ngahudhuthul]] || [[word:ngahudhujul|ngahudhujul]] || [[word:ngahudhushul|ngahudhushul]] || [[word:ngahudhukul|ngahudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngahudhuthuthu|ngahudhuthuthu]] || [[word:ngahudhujuju|ngahudhujuju]] || [[word:ngahudhushushu|ngahudhushushu]] || [[word:ngahudhuku|ngahudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngahudhuthun|ngahudhuthun]] || [[word:ngahudhujun|ngahudhujun]] || [[word:ngahudhushun|ngahudhushun]] || [[word:ngahudhukun|ngahudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngahudhuthuoro|ngahudhuthuoro]] || [[word:ngahudhujuoro|ngahudhujuoro]] || [[word:ngahudhushuoro|ngahudhushuoro]] || [[word:ngahudhukuoro|ngahudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
